body: @hangleang disabled syncing from the current head - 1 epoch because it redownloaded too much. I propose we do 5 resyncs from current head and if it fails we do another 5 resynces from current head - 1 epoch. @Tumas implemented it. He will push it now and it should redeploy automatically to devnet. Tomorrow we will check did it help.
title: Fix Fulu devnet syncing

body: This should save some CPU cycles for Fulu.
title: Do not verify blobs imported from EL

body:
Fixes these rate limiter warnings: 

```
[2025-09-17T12:55:44.976+00:00] [ERROR] [eth2_libp2p::rpc::self_limiter] [peers: 29/100] Self rate limiting error for a batch that will never fit. Sending request anyway. Check configuration parameters., service: libp2p_rpc, service: libp2p, protocol: blob_sidecars_by_range
[2025-09-17T12:55:44.976+00:00] [ERROR] [eth2_libp2p::rpc::self_limiter] [peers: 29/100] Self rate limiting error for a batch that will never fit. Sending request anyway. Check configuration parameters., service: libp2p_rpc, service: libp2p, protocol: blob_sidecars_by_range
```

This happens when syncing **without checkpoint-sync** and when _current fork according to the wall clock is Fulu but head is still in Electra._ Max expected responses are calculated by current fork which is based on wall clock and not on the head state / sync state. This only affects blob sidecars by range
title: Fix expected max responses for `BlobsByRange` requests

title: Remove `NumberOfColumns` as constant

body:
Hey Saulius and team,

While doing some Fusaka tests I encountered this bug where Grandine refuses post-Fulu blocks on the `/eth/v2/beacon/blocks` Beacon API endpoint. Grandine appears to think the submitted blocks are Electra blocks, even though they are Fulu blocks as indicated by the `Eth-Consensus-Version` header. Grandine's error message:

`{"code":400,"message":"invalid block: state and block phases do not match (state: fulu, block: electra)"}`

I discovered this only happens for JSON-encoded blocks, SSZ works fine. I haven't tested the blinded block paths but I suspect those could be affected in the same way.

Kurtosis reproducer config:

```
participants:
  - el_type: geth
    el_image: docker.ethquokkaops.io/dh/ethpandaops/geth:fusaka-devnet-3
    cl_type: grandine
    cl_image: docker.ethquokkaops.io/dh/ethpandaops/grandine:fusaka-devnet-3
    use_separate_vc: true
    vc_type: vero
    vc_image: ghcr.io/serenita-org/vero:fusaka
    use_remote_signer: true

additional_services:
  - dora
  - prometheus_grafana

network_params:
  genesis_delay: 60
  electra_fork_epoch: 0
  fulu_fork_epoch: 1
  seconds_per_slot: 3
```
title: Grandine fails to process JSON-encoded Fulu blocks on `POST /eth/v2/beacon/blocks`

title: Combine different KzgProof collections into a combined type

body: Update spec tests to https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/releases/tag/v1.6.0-alpha.4, there are 2 new SSZ types has been introduced in EIP7916, since those types are not relevant to Fulu, and PeerDAS specifically, I have just excluded from the script test. In this PR, I also (`mostly`) move `NumberOfColumns` into preset to compliant with the [spec change](https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/pull/4485) while keep it as constant in some place where involve too deep changes.
title: Update consensus-spec-tests to v1.6.0-alpha.4
